title: Thoracic outlet syndrome - NHS
text:
nclude:
being born with an extra rib – this is known as a cervical rib poor posture having large breasts an injury to the chest, neck or ribs (such as a car accident) jobs or activities that involve lots of repetitive arm movements (for example if you're a builder or do lots of swimming) gaining a lot of muscle (for example, if you're a body builder) 
Page last reviewed: 14 December 2023
Next review due: 14 December 2026
